title: Opt::unwrap_or on the ground floor
statement: From docs/specpack/idioms.md #2. Define the result-shaped `enum Opt[T] { ok Some(T), None }` and `fn unwrap_or[T: copy](o: Opt[T], d: T) -> T` returning the payload or the default. `copy` keeps `Opt[T]` drop-inert so the function is non-`alloc`. Define only these items.
